meta.title: GCP-ADP-4: BigQuery, Dataplex, and Reporting Fundamentals

questions.stem: A team needs low-cost durable object storage for raw files before transformation. Which Google Cloud service is the best fit?

options.explanation: `Cloud Storage` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.
